nasb.text: She said, “These six measures of barley he gave to me, for he said, ‘Do not go to your mother-in-law empty-handed.’ ”

esv.text: saying, “These six measures of barley he gave to me, for he said to me, ‘You must not go back empty-handed to your mother-in-law.’”

cnv.text: 又說：“他給我這六簸箕大麥，對我說：‘不要空手去見你婆婆。’”

ccb.text: 她又说：“那个人给了我六簸箕大麦，对我说，‘不要空手回去见你婆婆。’”

csbs.text: 她又说：“那个人给了我这六簸箕大麦，因为他对我说：‘不要空手回到你婆婆那里。’”
